completedSteps.summary: 新增 helper，并在 Amap 与推荐层双重接入。

artifacts.description: Validation report stored under app due sandbox write restriction

blockers.description: Sandbox forbids binding a local port and resolving restapi.amap.com, so real API spot checks could not run here.

nextActions: Re-run real API verification for 体育西路 and 珠江新城 in an environment with outbound network access.
Move or copy the validation report into the project root eval directory once write access is available.
contextDigest: 本次任务只做晚餐推荐纯度最小修复。根因是 Amap `poi.type` 被截成首段，导致推荐层无法识别咖啡/茶饮/甜品细分类。修复方案是在 `src/lib/dinner-intent.ts` 中统一基于 `typecode`、名称与分类路径判定晚餐资格，并在 Amap 映射和推荐层同时应用。构建通过；真实 API 验证受沙箱端口与网络限制阻断，已用实际编译后的 helper + 推荐逻辑对 Stage 5 暴露的污染样本做合成验证。

decisionLog.decision: Use a shared dinner-intent helper instead of scattering keyword checks.
decisionLog.reason: Keeps API filtering and recommendation fallback aligned with the smallest architectural change.
decisionLog.alternatives: Only adjust recommend.ts, which would leave the source pool polluted.

decisionLog.decision: Keep `category` user-friendly while storing `categoryPath` and `typecode` for filtering.
decisionLog.reason: Avoids degrading favorites/history display while restoring enough detail for dinner filtering.
decisionLog.alternatives: Overwrite `category` with the full raw Amap type path.
